title: Stabbing in Jewish Area in North London Treated as a Terrorist Incident, Police Say
summary_full: Two men who were stabbed in Golders Green on Wednesday were in stable condition, the police said. One man was arrested on suspicion of attempted murder.
summary_public: Two men who were stabbed in Golders Green on Wednesday were in stable condition, the police said. One man was arrested on suspicion of attempted murder.
